proposal.summary: Launch the generated Windows player in a short smoke run, capture its log, and record whether startup is clean.

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends GeneratedPlayerSmokeValidation.

current_state: Completed. The generated Windows player starts in headless smoke mode and writes a clean startup log with no error-pattern matches, but it required validation termination and deeper deterministic smoke coverage is still needed.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for Stage1AutomatedSmokeTests only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start Stage1AutomatedSmokeTests to add concrete Unity smoke tests for Stage1 start, HUD, room movement, and core runtime wiring.
